# my-saas-app

## Project Overview

A SaaS web application with a React/TypeScript frontend and Node.js/Express REST API backend. Users can manage projects, invite team members, and track tasks. Deployed on AWS with PostgreSQL via RDS and Redis for session caching.

---

## Tech Stack

| Technology | Version | Role |
|---|---|---|
| TypeScript | 5.x | language |
| React | ^18 | frontend-framework |
| Next.js | ^14 | full-stack-framework |
| Node.js | ^20 | runtime |
| Express | ^4 | api-framework |
| PostgreSQL | ^15 | database |
| Prisma | ^5 | orm |
| Redis | ^7 | cache |
| Jest | ^29 | test-runner |
| Playwright | ^1 | e2e-test-runner |
| ESLint | ^8 | linter |
| Prettier | ^3 | formatter |
| Tailwind CSS | ^3 | css-framework |

---

## Directory Layout

| Path | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `src/app/` | Next.js App Router pages and layouts |
| `src/components/` | Reusable React components |
| `src/lib/` | Shared utilities, types, and helpers |
| `src/server/` | Express API routes and middleware |
| `src/server/services/` | Business logic services |
| `src/server/repositories/` | Database access layer (Prisma) |
| `prisma/` | Prisma schema and migration files |
| `tests/` | Jest unit and integration tests |
| `e2e/` | Playwright end-to-end tests |
| `.github/workflows/` | GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines |
| `infra/` | Terraform infrastructure definitions |

---

## Build & Dev Commands

```sh
npm ci          # install
npm run dev     # development server
npm test        # run test suite
npm run lint    # lint
npm run format  # format
npm run build   # production build
npm run deploy:prod  # deploy
```

---

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Required | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|
| `DATABASE_URL` | Yes | PostgreSQL connection string | `postgresql://user:pass@localhost:5432/mydb` |
| `REDIS_URL` | Yes | Redis connection string | `redis://localhost:6379` |
| `JWT_SECRET` | Yes | Secret for signing JWT tokens | ŌĆö |
| `NEXTAUTH_SECRET` | Yes | NextAuth.js secret | ŌĆö |
| `NEXTAUTH_URL` | Yes | Public URL of the app | `http://localhost:3000` |
| `NODE_ENV` | No | Environment: development, production, test | `development` |

---

## AI Behavior Rules

### Code Style

1. **TypeScript strict mode is enabled.** Never use `any` type without an explicit `// eslint-disable` comment explaining why.
   > *Why: Strict mode catches null/undefined errors at compile time. Disabling it silently reduces type safety.*

2. **Never use `console.log/debug/warn` in production code.** Use the project logger from `src/lib/logger.ts` instead.
   > *Why: console.log leaks implementation details and is not configurable.*

### Architecture

1. **Next.js App Router components are Server Components by default.** Only add `'use client'` directive when the component needs browser APIs, state, or event handlers.

### Testing

1. **Unit test files must be colocated with their source file.** `UserCard.tsx` ŌåÆ `UserCard.test.tsx`. Integration tests go in `tests/`.

### Security

1. **Never hardcode secrets, API keys, passwords, or connection strings in source code.** Always use environment variables.

### Git

1. **Commit messages must follow Conventional Commits format:** `type(scope): description`. Types: feat, fix, chore, docs, refactor, test, perf, ci.

### Agent Behavior

1. When reviewing PRs, flag PRs with more than 400 changed lines as too large. Suggest splitting by concern.

---

## File-Specific Rules

### `src/components/**/*.tsx`

1. **React components must use PascalCase** for both the filename and the exported component name. Use named exports, not default exports.

### `src/server/**/*.ts`

1. **All API route handlers must validate input with Zod before processing.** Never trust `req.body`, `req.query`, or `req.params` without validation.

### `src/server/repositories/**/*.ts`

1. **Use Prisma query builder for all database access.** Never construct raw SQL with string interpolation. Use `prisma.$queryRaw` only with `Prisma.sql` template tag.

---

## Agent Definitions

See `AGENTS.md` for full agent definitions.

- **Frontend Specialist** ŌĆö React/Next.js frontend: `src/app/**`, `src/components/**`
- **API Specialist** ŌĆö Express REST API + Prisma: `src/server/**`, `prisma/**`

---

## Memory & Context Files

Always loaded:
- `prisma/schema.prisma` ŌĆö database schema (always relevant)
- `src/lib/types.ts` ŌĆö shared TypeScript types

On demand:
- `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`
- `docs/API.md`
- `CONTRIBUTING.md`

---

## Hooks

> These are implemented in `settings.json`. This section documents their purpose.

- **PostToolUse/Edit**: Runs `npm run lint --silent` after any file edit
- **Stop**: Reminds to run `npm test` before committing
